mapper.select: SELECT p.PLANT_CD AS plantCd, p.COMPANY_CD AS companyCd, c.COMPANY_NM AS companyNm, p.PLANT_NM AS plantNm, p.ADDR AS addr, p.TEL_NO AS telNo, p.USE_YN AS useYn FROM MST_PLANT p JOIN MST_COMPANY c ON c.COMPANY_CD = p.COMPANY_CD WHERE p.PLANT_CD = #{plantCd}
mapper.update: UPDATE MST_PLANT SET COMPANY_CD = #{request.companyCd}, PLANT_NM = #{request.plantNm}, ADDR = #{request.addr}, TEL_NO = #{request.telNo}, USE_YN = COALESCE(#{request.useYn}, 'Y'), UPD_USER_ID = #{updUserId}, UPD_DTM = NOW() WHERE PLANT_CD = #{request.plantCd}
